## Summary

Brief description of changes. Reference the ticket: Closes #XX (ARG-XXX).

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, or tooling changes

## What Changed

Describe the implementation approach and key decisions made.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests written (TDD — tests were written first)
- [ ] Integration tests written/updated
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`./mvnw test` / `npm test`)
- [ ] Coverage meets threshold (>80% backend / >70% frontend)
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or GIFs demonstrating the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Swagger/OpenAPI docs updated (if API change)
